subcodes.first_line: O servant of the sacred divine Threshold! Thy letter hath been received and its contents noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس الهی نامه مرقوم ملحوظ افتاد و بر مضمون اطلاع حاصل گشت و
subcodes.subjects: @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love
